tasks.subject: Task 1: ChipsAgGridCellRendererComponent in maia-ui
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New Angular component that renders a `{name: string}[]` value as read-only `<mat-chip>` elements; exported from maia-ui public API; library rebuilt.

**Files:**
- Create: `libs/maia-ui-workspace/projects/maia-ui/src/lib/components/chips-ag-grid-cell-renderer/chips-ag-grid-cell-renderer.component.ts`
- Modify: `libs/maia-ui-workspace/projects/maia-ui/src/public-api.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Component compiles and exports from `@maia/maia-ui`
- [ ] `maia-ui` builds without errors

**Verify:** `cd libs/maia-ui-workspace && npm run build` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/maia-ui-workspace/projects/maia-ui/src/lib/components/chips-ag-grid-cell-renderer/chips-ag-grid-cell-renderer.component.ts", "libs/maia-ui-workspace/projects/maia-ui/src/public-api.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd libs/maia-ui-workspace && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Component compiles and exports from @maia/maia-ui", "maia-ui builds without errors"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: New spec classes — DtoHtmlTableManyToManyColumnDef, ManyToManyAggregationDef, PkAndNameListFieldType
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Three new Kotlin classes in maia-gen-spec that represent the many-to-many column in table defs, the aggregation metadata, and the list field type for TypeScript generation.

**Files:**
- Create: `maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/DtoHtmlTableManyToManyColumnDef.kt`
- Create: `maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/ManyToManyAggregationDef.kt`
- Modify: `maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/lang/FieldType.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `DtoHtmlTableManyToManyColumnDef` compiles with `columnName = "rightEntities"`, `headerName = "Right Entities"`
- [ ] `ManyToManyAggregationDef` compiles carrying `joinEntityDef`, `rightEntityDef`, `leftEntityDef`
- [ ] `PkAndNameListFieldType` compiles with `jdbcCompatibleType` throwing `IllegalStateException`
- [ ] `./gradlew :maia-gen:maia-gen-spec:build` passes

**Verify:** `./gradlew :maia-gen:maia-gen-spec:build` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/DtoHtmlTableManyToManyColumnDef.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/ManyToManyAggregationDef.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/lang/FieldType.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew :maia-gen:maia-gen-spec:build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DtoHtmlTableManyToManyColumnDef compiles", "ManyToManyAggregationDef compiles", "PkAndNameListFieldType compiles with jdbcCompatibleType throwing", "maia-gen-spec builds"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Wire new classes into DtoHtmlTableDef, DtoHtmlTableDefBuilder, SearchableDtoDef, AgGridCellRendererDefs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hook the new spec classes into the existing spec DSL: `DtoHtmlTableDef` gains `manyToManyColumnDef` and injects `rightEntities` into `dtoClassFields`; `DtoHtmlTableDefBuilder` gains `manyToManyColumn(joinEntityDef)`; `SearchableDtoDef` gains `manyToManyAggregationDef`; `AgGridCellRendererDefs` gains `manyToManyChips`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/DtoHtmlTableDef.kt`
- Modify: `maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/builders/DtoHtmlTableDefBuilder.kt`
- Modify: `maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/SearchableDtoDef.kt`
- Modify: `maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/AgGridCellRendererDefs.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `DtoHtmlTableDef` accepts optional `manyToManyColumnDef` and appends `rightEntities` ClassFieldDef when present
- [ ] `DtoHtmlTableDefBuilder.manyToManyColumn(EntityDef)` derives rightEntityDef from FK fields not pointing to root entity
- [ ] `SearchableDtoDef` accepts `manyToManyAggregationDef: ManyToManyAggregationDef? = null`
- [ ] `AgGridCellRendererDefs.manyToManyChips` references `ChipsAgGridCellRendererComponent`
- [ ] `./gradlew :maia-gen:maia-gen-spec:build` passes

**Verify:** `./gradlew :maia-gen:maia-gen-spec:build` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/DtoHtmlTableDef.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/builders/DtoHtmlTableDefBuilder.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/SearchableDtoDef.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/spec/definition/AgGridCellRendererDefs.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew :maia-gen:maia-gen-spec:build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DtoHtmlTableDef appends rightEntities ClassFieldDef when manyToManyColumnDef present", "DtoHtmlTableDefBuilder.manyToManyColumn() derives rightEntityDef", "SearchableDtoDef accepts manyToManyAggregationDef", "AgGridCellRendererDefs.manyToManyChips compiles", "maia-gen-spec builds"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Generator renderers — DAO, TypeScript interface, AG Grid table component, DaoLayerModuleGenerator
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Four generator-side changes: (1) `DaoLayerModuleGenerator` skips `RowMapperRenderer` when `manyToManyAggregationDef != null`; (2) `SearchableDtoJdbcDaoRenderer` generates inline named-param row mapper + two-query merge; (3) `TypescriptInterfaceDtoRenderer` handles `PkAndNameListFieldType`; (4) `DtoHtmlAgGridTableComponentRenderer` handles `DtoHtmlTableManyToManyColumnDef`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/generator/DaoLayerModuleGenerator.kt`
- Modify: `maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/SearchableDtoJdbcDaoRenderer.kt`
- Modify: `maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/ui/TypescriptInterfaceDtoRenderer.kt`
- Modify: `maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/ui/DtoHtmlAgGridTableComponentRenderer.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `DaoLayerModuleGenerator` conditionally skips `RowMapperRenderer` when aggregation def present
- [ ] `SearchableDtoJdbcDaoRenderer` emits inline `MaiaRowMapper` with named params + `rightEntities = emptyList()` + two-query merge block
- [ ] `TypescriptInterfaceDtoRenderer` emits `ReadonlyArray<RightPkAndNameDto>` for `PkAndNameListFieldType`
- [ ] `DtoHtmlAgGridTableComponentRenderer` emits chips col def + imports for many-to-many column
- [ ] `./gradlew :maia-gen:maia-gen-generator:build` passes

**Verify:** `./gradlew :maia-gen:maia-gen-generator:build` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/generator/DaoLayerModuleGenerator.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/SearchableDtoJdbcDaoRenderer.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/ui/TypescriptInterfaceDtoRenderer.kt", "maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/ui/DtoHtmlAgGridTableComponentRenderer.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew :maia-gen:maia-gen-generator:build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DaoLayerModuleGenerator conditionally skips RowMapperRenderer", "SearchableDtoJdbcDaoRenderer emits inline named-param row mapper + two-query merge", "TypescriptInterfaceDtoRenderer handles PkAndNameListFieldType", "DtoHtmlAgGridTableComponentRenderer handles DtoHtmlTableManyToManyColumnDef", "maia-gen-generator builds"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Showcase spec — enhance leftEntityDef, add leftDtoHtmlTableDef + leftCrudDef, run maiaGeneration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `MaiaShowcaseSpec.kt` gains `fieldDisplayName`/`editableByUser()`/`crud {}` on `leftEntityDef`, plus `leftDtoHtmlTableDef` and `leftCrudDef`; then `maiaGeneration` produces valid `LeftTableDto`, `LeftTableDtoDao`, `LeftCrudTableComponent`, and related generated files.

**Files:**
- Modify: `maia-showcase/spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/showcase/MaiaShowcaseSpec.kt`
- Generated (do not edit): `maia-showcase/domain/src/generated/...`, `maia-showcase/dao/src/generated/...`, `maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/generated/...`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `leftEntityDef` has `fieldDisplayName`, `editableByUser()`, `crud { apis { create(); update(); delete() } }`
- [ ] `leftDtoHtmlTableDef` has `columnFromDto("id")`, `tableSomeStringFromLeft`, `tableSomeIntFromLeft`, `manyToManyColumn(manyToManyJoinEntityDef)`, `editActionColumn()`, `deleteActionColumn()`
- [ ] `leftCrudDef` created with `crudTableDef(leftDtoHtmlTableDef, leftEntityDef.entityCrudApiDef!!)`
- [ ] `./gradlew :maia-showcase:maiaGeneration` exits 0
- [ ] Generated `LeftTableDto` contains `rightEntities: List<RightPkAndNameDto>`
- [ ] Generated DAO contains two-query merge logic
- [ ] Generated TypeScript interface has `rightEntities: ReadonlyArray<RightPkAndNameDto>`
- [ ] Generated AG Grid component has chips column def

**Verify:** `./gradlew :maia-showcase:maiaGeneration && ./gradlew :maia-showcase:build` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["maia-showcase/spec/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/showcase/MaiaShowcaseSpec.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew :maia-showcase:maiaGeneration && ./gradlew :maia-showcase:build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["leftEntityDef has fieldDisplayName/editableByUser/crud", "leftDtoHtmlTableDef correct columns", "leftCrudDef created", "maiaGeneration exits 0", "LeftTableDto has rightEntities field", "DAO has two-query merge", "TypeScript interface has ReadonlyArray<RightPkAndNameDto>", "AG Grid component has chips col def"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Angular left-blotter page + /left route

tasks.subject: Task 7: LeftBlotterPage Kotlin page object + LeftEntityCrudPlaywrightTest
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Kotlin `LeftBlotterPage` page object + `LeftEntityCrudPlaywrightTest` that asserts chips render and full CRUD journey works; test passes green.

**Files:**
- Create: `maia-showcase/app/src/test/kotlin/org/maiaframework/showcase/testing/pages/LeftBlotterPage.kt`
- Create: `maia-showcase/app/src/test/kotlin/org/maiaframework/showcase/many_to_many/LeftEntityCrudPlaywrightTest.kt`
- Modify: `maia-showcase/app/src/test/kotlin/org/maiaframework/showcase/AbstractPlaywrightTest.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `LeftBlotterPage` has all required methods including `assertChipVisible(chipText)`
- [ ] `AbstractPlaywrightTest` initializes `leftBlotterPage`
- [ ] `LeftEntityCrudPlaywrightTest` `@BeforeAll` sets up rightEntity1/2, leftEntityFixture, 2 join records via @Autowired DAOs
- [ ] `crud journey` test passes: assertChipVisible for both right entities, create/edit/cancel-delete/confirm-delete flow
- [ ] `./gradlew :maia-showcase:app:test --tests "org.maiaframework.showcase.many_to_many.LeftEntityCrudPlaywrightTest"` passes

**Verify:** `./gradlew :maia-showcase:app:test --tests "org.maiaframework.showcase.many_to_many.LeftEntityCrudPlaywrightTest"` → BUILD SUCCESSFUL, 1 test passed
